headlines.title: DHS to require green card applicants to return to home countries to apply
headlines.description: The Trump administration announced that people with temporary visas seeking to adjust their immigration status to obtain green cards must return to their home countries to “do so through consular processing,” in a major change from current practice. NBC News' Jonathan Allen explains the impact and how the new requirement will be enforced.

headlines.title: Judge dismisses charges against Kilmar Abrego Garcia in human trafficking case
headlines.description: A federal judge in Tennessee dismissed the criminal charges against Kilmar Abrego Garcia on Friday, finding that the investigation into his alleged involvement with human trafficking was “tainted.”

headlines.title: Ted Cruz says GOP senators screamed at Todd Blanche in ‘anti-weaponization’ fund briefing
headlines.description: Senate Republicans met with the acting attorney general to discuss the $1.8 billion fund, which ultimately derailed a vote on a bill to fund ICE and Border Patrol

headlines.title: House Republicans cancel vote curbing Trump on Iran
headlines.description: House Republicans delayed a vote on a war powers resolution that would restrict President Donald Trump’s ability to continue U.S. military operations in Iran.

headlines.title: Iran-U.S. diplomacy intensifies as Trump seeks ‘right answers,’ Tehran signals gaps ‘reduced’
headlines.description: A new burst of diplomatic action intensified Thursday in a push to break the deadlock between the United States and Iran.

headlines.title: Thousands under evacuation orders in Southern California amid threat of chemical explosion
headlines.description: Thousands of people in Southern California are under evacuation orders over fears that a tank containing toxic chemicals may explode. Authorities in Orange County said they’re unable to control the valves on a tank at an aerospace manufacturing facility in Garden Grove.

headlines.title: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as director of national intelligence
headlines.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard announced her resignation from President Trump’s Cabinet. Her last day will be June 30th.

headlines.title: ‘It Takes Two’ rapper Rob Base dies at 59
headlines.description: Rapper Rob Base died Friday at age 59 after a cancer diagnosis, according to a post on his social media.

headlines.title: SpaceX successfully launches prototype of Starship rocket
headlines.description: Elon Musk's company SpaceX successfully launched a prototype of its Starship rocket after scrubbing the planned May 21 launch due to technical difficulties.

headlines.title: 911 call reveals Kyle Busch was coughing up blood, short of breath day before death
headlines.description: Racing legend Kyle Busch was coughing up blood and lying on a bathroom floor when somebody called for help from a General Motors training facility in North Carolina, according to the 911 call obtained by NBC News.

headlines.title: Arkansas pastor abused girls for 15 years without church stopping him, lawsuit alleges
headlines.description: Long before Tony Waller, an Assemblies of God pastor, was convicted of raping girls, children told church leaders about hidden cameras, drugged drinks and abuse, a lawsuit says.

headlines.title: Watch highlights from Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show' finale
headlines.description: Watch highlights of the star-studded sendoff as Stephen Colbert brings the curtain down on 33 years of “The Late Show,” with legends like Jon Stewart, Paul McCartney, Bryan Cranston, and many surprises.
